extraction.one_line_summary: ARMÉE Sander attacked from a 5-rider breakaway 600m from finish on 20km at 7% climb, winning solo after forcing others to chase.
tactical_patterns: ARU Fabio attacked solo from GC group 25km out, maintaining 1-minute buffer through summit without team support.
FROOME Chris preserved three teammates including POELS through penultimate climb despite repeated Spanish attacks, then countered at 500m.
ALAPHILIPPE Julian, LUTSENKO Alexey, and GOUGEARD Alexis reached final 10km together but lost sprint tactics to patient ARMÉE.
Astana initiated GC attacks on second climb forcing CONTADOR Alberto, DE LA CRUZ David responses before final ascent.

rider_signals.ARMÉE Sander: positive: won from patience tactics at age 31 in 8th pro year, suggesting breakaway sprinters need hoarding energy
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: lost 18 seconds despite 1-minute solo advantage and 25km effort, revealing insufficient gap-building power
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: retained three teammates through attacks then out-sprinted all but ARU at 500m, exposing superior depth
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: neutral: followed attacks but only matched FROOME and WOODS in final sprint, showing diminished attacking threat
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: lost 21 seconds to FROOME despite no decisive moves, indicating deteriorating position defense
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: negative: multiple stage wins this Vuelta but dropped before final 600m sprint from five-rider group
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: only rider besides CONTADOR matching FROOME's 500m counter-attack on summit finish
